spec:
# Spending Insights — Component Specification

**Screen:** CashPulse / Screen 3 — Spending Insights
**Spec Version:** 1.0
**Token Source:** designTokens v1.0
**Research Brief Source:** UX Research Brief v1.0

---

## 1. Component Tree

```
InsightsScreen
├── TopBar                                      [global, sticky]
│   ├── LogoMark                                [nav → Screen 1]
│   ├── NavTabGroup
│   │   ├── NavTab[label="Dashboard"]
│   │   ├── NavTab[label="Add Expense"]
│   │   └── NavTab[label="Insights", active=true]
│   └── TopBarControls
│       ├── MonthSelector
│       │   ├── ChevronButton[direction="prev"]
│       │   ├── MonthLabel                      [e.g. "March 2026"]
│       │   └── ChevronButton[direction="next"]
│       └── SettingsIconButton
│
├── InsightsScrollContainer                     [main content area]
│   ├── PeriodSummaryCard                       [L1 — macro context]
│   │   ├── StatCell[id="total-spent"]
│   │   │   ├── StatValue                       ["$1,247.50"]
│   │   │   ├── StatLabel                       ["Total Spent"]
│   │   │   └── TrendBadge[variant="positive|negative|neutral"]
│   │   │       ├── TrendArrow                  [↑ / ↓ / —]
│   │   │       └── TrendText                   ["12% vs last month"]
│   │   ├── StatDivider
│   │   ├── StatCell[id="daily-average"]
│   │   │   ├── StatValue                       ["$41.58"]
│   │   │   ├── StatLabel                       ["Daily Average"]
│   │   │   └── TrendBadge[variant="positive|negative|neutral"]
│   │   ├── StatDivider
│   │   └── StatCell[id="transaction-count"]
│   │       ├── StatValue                       ["30"]
│   │       ├── StatLabel                       ["Transactions"]
│   │       └── TrendBadge[variant="neutral"]   [always gray — no valence]
│   │           └── TrendText                   ["+N / −N count delta"]
│   │
│   ├── DailySpendingChartCard                  [L2 — temporal pattern]
│   │   ├── ChartCardHeader
│   │   │   ├── ChartCardTitle                  ["Daily Spending"]
│   │   │   └── ChartTypeToggle
│   │   │       ├── ToggleChip[value="bar", default=selected]
│   │   │       └── ToggleChip[value="line"]
│   │   ├── ChartArea
│   │   │   ├── YAxisLabels                     [4–5 value labels]
│   │   │   ├── ChartPlotArea
│   │   │   │   ├── BarSeries                   [visible when toggle="bar"]
│   │   │   │   │   └── DailyBar × 31           [color: normal/over-avg]
│   │   │   │   ├── LineSeries                  [visible when toggle="line"]
│   │   │   │   │   ├── LinePathSVG
│   │   │   │   │   ├── AreaFillSVG
│   │   │   │   │   └── DataPointCircle × 31
│   │   │   │   ├── AverageLine                 [dashed, amber, both modes]
│   │   │   │   ├── AverageLineLabel            ["avg $41.58"]
│   │   │   │   └── ChartTooltip                [portal-rendered]
│   │   │   │       ├── TooltipDate             ["Mar 15"]
│   │   │   │       ├── TooltipAmount           ["$67.30"]
│   │   │   │       └── TooltipTxCount          ["3 transactions"]
│   │   │   └── XAxisLabels                     [day numbers: 1, 5, 10…]
│   │   └── PartialDataNote                     [conditional: "Based on X days of data"]
│   │
│   ├── TopCategoriesCard                       [L2 — categorical pattern]
│   │   ├── TopCategoriesHeader                 ["Top Categories"]
│   │   ├── CategoryStackedBar
│   │   │   └── StackedSegment × n              [min 4px width; <4px → merged "Other"]
│   │   │       └── SegmentTooltip              [portal-rendered]
│   │   │           ├── TooltipCategoryName
│   │   │           ├── TooltipAmount
│   │   │           └── TooltipPercent
│   │   └── CategoryRowList
│   │       └── CategoryRow × n                 [sorted by spend desc]
│   │           ├── CategoryColorDot
│   │           ├── CategoryName
│   │           ├── CategoryProgressBar
│   │           │   └── ProgressBarFill
│   │           ├── CategoryAmount
│   │           └── CategoryPercent
│   │
│   ├── BiggestExpensesCard                     [L3 — individual context]
│   │   ├── BiggestExpensesHeader               ["Biggest Expenses"]
│   │   └── ExpenseRankedList
│   │       └── ExpenseRow × 5                  [role="listitem"]
│   │           ├── RankBadge[rank=1..5]        [circle, 28px]
│   │           ├── ExpenseDetails
│   │           │   ├── MerchantName
│   │           │   └── ExpenseMeta             ["Category · Mar DD"]
│   │           └── ExpenseAmount
│   │
│   ├── MonthComparisonCard                     [L3 — historical context]
│   │   ├── ComparisonHeader                    ["Month-over-Month"]
│   │   ├── ComparisonBarGroup
│   │   │   ├── ComparisonBarColumn[period="last"]
│   │   │   │   ├── ComparisonBar               [muted, proportional height]
│   │   │   │   ├── BarPeriodLabel              ["Last Month"]
│   │   │   │   └── BarAmountLabel              ["$1,389.50"]
│   │   │   └── ComparisonBarColumn[period="current"]
│   │   │       ├── ComparisonBar               [cta-primary, proportional height]
│   │   │       ├── BarPeriodLabel              ["This Month"]
│   │   │       └── BarAmountLabel              ["$1,247.50"]
│   │   └── ComparisonSummaryBadge              [positive / negative variant]
│   │       ├── BadgeIcon                       [✓ / ✗]
│   │       └── BadgeText                       ["You spent $142 less this month"]
│   │
│   └── ExportRow                               [utility — right-aligned]
│       └── ExportCsvButton
│           └── ExportButtonLabel               [live region for SR feedback]
│
└── EmptyStateOverlay                           [conditional — all cards empty]
    ├── EmptyStateIcon
    ├── EmptyStateHeading
    ├── EmptyStateBody
    └── EmptyStateCtaButton                     ["Add Expense" → Screen 2]
```

---

## 2. Layout Rules

### 2.1 Page-Level Layout

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  TopBar (sticky, full-width, z-index: sticky / 1100)    │
│  height: 64px  bg: surface-primary  border-b: border-default│
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                         │
│  InsightsScrollContainer                                │
│  padding-top: 64px (offset for sticky TopBar)           │
│  padding-x: 24px (layout.margin)                        │
│  padding-bottom: 48px                                   │
│                                                         │
│  ┌── card-stack (max-width: 680px, centered) ─────────┐ │
│  │  gap between cards: 16px                           │ │
│  │                                                    │ │
│  │  PeriodSummaryCard    ← full content width         │ │
│  │  DailySpendingCard    ← full content width         │ │
│  │  TopCategoriesCard    ← full content width         │ │
│  │  BiggestExpensesCard  ← full content width         │ │
│  │  MonthComparisonCard  ← full content width         │ │
│  │                                                    │ │
│  │  ExportRow            ← right-aligned, mt: 8px     │ │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
│                                                         │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 2.2 Card Shell Rules (All Cards)

| Property | Value | Token |
|---|---|---|
| Background | `#1E293B` | `surface-primary` |
| Border radius | `10px` | `borders.radius.medium` |
| Box shadow | `0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)` | `elevation.level-1` |
| Internal padding | `24px` | `spacing[5]` = 24 |
| Card title typography | `heading-2` — 16px / 600 / DM Sans | |
| Card title color | `#CBD5E1` | `text-primary` |

### 2.3 PeriodSummaryCard Layout

```
┌─────────────────┬────────────────┬─────────────────┐
│   StatCell      │   StatCell     │   StatCell      │
│   (flex: 1)     │   (flex: 1)    │   (flex: 1)     │
└─────────────────┴────────────────┴─────────────────┘
```

- Layout: `display: flex; flex-direction: row`
- Each `StatCell`: `flex: 1; text-align: center`
- `StatDivider`: `width: 1px; height: 40px; align-self: center; background: border-default`
- Internal padding per cell: `16px 12px`
- `StatValue` stacking: value → label → trend (column, `gap: 2px`)

### 2.4 DailySpendingChartCard Layout

```
ChartCardHeader:
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center
  margin-bottom: 16px

ChartArea:
  display: flex; flex-direction: row
  YAxisLabels: width: 40px; flex-shrink: 0; text-align: right; padding-right: 8px
  ChartPlotArea: flex: 1; height: 200px (see responsive overrides)
    position: relative (anchor for AverageLine and Tooltip)
    XAxisLabels: height: 20px; below plot area

PartialDataNote:
  text-align: center; margin-top: 8px
```

### 2.5 TopCategoriesCard Layout

```
CategoryStackedBar:
  height: 12px; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden
  display: flex; flex-direction: row
  margin-bottom: 16px
  Segments: flex-basis proportional to % share; min-width: 4px

CategoryRowList:
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px

CategoryRow:
  display: flex; align-items: center; height: 44px; gap: 12px
  ├── ColorDot:        width/height: 10px; border-radius: pill; flex-shrink: 0
  ├── CategoryName:    flex: 1; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap
  ├── ProgressBar:     width: 120px; height: 6px; border-radius: 4px; flex-shrink: 0
  ├── CategoryAmount:  width: 64px; text-align: right; flex-shrink: 0
  └── CategoryPercent: width: 36px; text-align: right; flex-shrink: 0
```

### 2.6 BiggestExpensesCard Layout

```
ExpenseRankedList:
  display: flex; flex-direction: column

ExpenseRow:
  display: flex; align-items: center; height: 52px; gap: 12px
  padding: 0 0  (row is full-width inside card padding)
  border-bottom: 1px solid border-default  (except last row)

  ├── RankBadge:     width/height: 28px; border-radius: pill; flex-shrink: 0
  │                  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center
  ├── ExpenseDetails: flex: 1; overflow: hidden
  │   ├── MerchantName:  display: block; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis
  │   └── ExpenseMeta:   display: block
  └── ExpenseAmount:  flex-shrink: 0; text-align: right
```

### 2.7 MonthComparisonCard Layout

```
ComparisonBarGroup:
  display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: center
  gap: 48px; align-items: flex-end
  height: 160px  (max bar height: 120px + 40px for labels below)
  margin: 16px 0

ComparisonBarColumn:
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px
  ComparisonBar:     width: 56px; border-radius: small(6px) small(6px) 0 0
                     height = proportional (0–120px), min 4px if non-zero
  BarPeriodLabel:    label typography
  BarAmountLabel:    body typography

ComparisonSummaryBadge:
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px
  padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: pill
  margin: 0 auto; (centered within card)
```

### 2.8 ExportRow Layout

```
ExportRow:
  display: flex; justify-content: flex-end
  margin-top: 8px; padding-bottom: 16px
  (remains in document flow — not sticky/floating)

ExportCsvButton:
  height: 44px (touch-target compliant); padding: 0 20px
```

---

## 3. Token Bindings

### 3.1 Color Token Bindings

| Component / Element | CSS Property | Token Name | Resolved Value |
|---|---|---|---|
| `InsightsScrollContainer` | background | `background-primary` | `#0F172A` |
| Card shell (all cards) | background | `surface-primary` | `#1E293B` |
| Card shell (all cards) | box-shadow | `elevation.level-1` | `0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)` |
| `StatDivider` | background | `border-default` | `#334155` |
| `StatValue` | color | `text-primary` | `#CBD5E1` |
| `StatLabel` | color | `text-secondary` | `#64748B` |
| `TrendBadge[variant=positive]` | color | `success` | `#14B8A6` |
| `TrendBadge[variant=negative]` | color | `error` | `#F87171` |
| `TrendBadge[variant=neutral]` | color | `text-secondary` | `#64748B` |
| `ChartCardTitle` | color | `text-primary` | `#CBD5E1` |
| `ToggleChip[selected]` | background | `cta-primary` | `#F59E0B` |
| `ToggleChip[selected]` | color | `text-on-cta` | `#0F172A` |

| `ToggleChip[unselected]` | color | `text-secondary` | `#64748B` |

| `ExpenseRow` divider | border-color | `border-default` | `#334155` |
| `RankBadge[rank=1]` | background | `cta-primary` | `#F59E0B` |
| `RankBadge[rank=1]` | color | `text-on-cta` | `#0F172A` |
| `RankBadge[rank=2–5]` | background | `surface-elevated` | `#293548` |
| `RankBadge[rank=2–5]` | color | `text-secondary` | `#64748B` |
| `MerchantName` | color | `text-primary` | `#CBD5E1` |

| `BarPeriodLabel` | color | `text-secondary` | `#64748B` |
| `BarAmountLabel` | color | `text-primary` | `#CBD5E1` |

### 3.2 Typography Token Bindings

| Component / Element | Role | Size | Weight | Family |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `StatValue` | `heading-1` | 24px | 700 | DM Sans |
| `StatLabel` | `label` | 12px | 500 | DM Mono |
| `TrendText` | `label` | 12px | 500 | DM Mono |
| `ChartCardTitle`, all card titles | `heading-2` | 16px | 600 | DM Sans |
| `ToggleChip` label | `label` | 12px | 500 | DM Mono |
| `YAxisLabels`, `XAxisLabels` | `label` | 12px | 500 | DM Mono |
| `TooltipDate` | `label` | 12px | 500 | DM Mono |
| `TooltipAmount` | `heading-3` | 15px | 500 | DM Sans |
| `TooltipTxCount` | `small` | 11px | 400 | DM Mono |
| `CategoryName` | `body` | 14px | 400 | DM Mono |
| `CategoryAmount` | `body` | 14px | 400 | DM Mono |
| `CategoryPercent` | `label` | 12px | 500 | DM Mono |
| `MerchantName` | `heading-3` | 15px | 500 | DM Sans |
| `ExpenseMeta` | `label` | 12px | 500 | DM Mono |
| `ExpenseAmount` | `body` | 14px | 400 | DM Mono |
| `RankBadge` numeral | `label` | 12px | 500 | DM Mono |
| `BarPeriodLabel` | `label` | 12px | 500 | DM Mono |
| `BarAmountLabel` | `body` | 14px | 400 | DM Mono |
| `ComparisonSummaryBadge` text | `label` | 12px | 500 | DM Mono |
| `ExportCsvButton` label | `heading-3` | 15px | 500 | DM Sans |
| `PartialDataNote` | `small` | 11px | 400 | DM Mono |
| Empty state heading | `heading-2` | 16px | 600 | DM Sans |
| Empty state body | `body` | 14px | 400 | DM Mono |

### 3.3 Spacing Token Bindings

| Element | Property | Token Scale Index | Value |
|---|---|---|---|
| Card internal padding | padding | `spacing[5]` | 24px |
| Card stack gap | gap | `spacing[3]` | 16px |
| `InsightsScrollContainer` padding-x | padding | `spacing[5]` | 24px |
| `InsightsScrollContainer` padding-bottom | padding | `spacing[7]` | 48px |
| `StatCell` internal padding | padding | `spacing[3]` / `spacing[2]` | 16px / 12px |
| `ChartCardHeader` margin-bottom | margin-bottom | `spacing[3]` | 16px |
| `YAxisLabels` padding-right | padding-right | `spacing[2]` | 8px |
| `CategoryRowList` gap | gap | `spacing[1]` | 4px |
| `CategoryRow` gap | gap | `spacing[2]` | 12px |
| `ExpenseRow` gap | gap | `spacing[2]` | 12px |
| `ComparisonBarGroup` gap | gap | `spacing[6]` | 48px |
| `ComparisonBarGroup` margin | margin | `spacing[3]` | 16px 0 |
| `ComparisonSummaryBadge` padding | padding | `spacing[2]` / `spacing[4]` | 8px 16px |
| `ExportRow` margin-top | margin-top | `spacing[2]` | 8px |
| `ExportCsvButton` padding-x | padding | `spacing[4]` | 20px |
| `PartialDataNote` margin-top | margin-top | `spacing[2]` | 8px |

### 3.4 Category Color Bindings

> **Note:** These are data-encoding colors absent from design tokens. Recommend adding as semantic tokens (e.g., `category-food`). Retained from PRD until token decision is made.

| Category | Color Variable | Hex Value |
|---|---|---|
| Food & Dining | `--category-food` | `#F97316` (orange-500) |
| Shopping | `--category-shopping` | `#8B5CF6` (violet-500) |
| Transport | `--category-transport` | `#3B82F6` (blue-500) |
| Bills | `--category-bills` | `#EC4899` (pink-500) |
| Entertainment | `--category-entertainment` | `#14B8A6` (teal-500 / mirrors success) |
| Health | `--category-health` | `#22C55E` (green-500) |
| Other (merged) | `--category-other` | `#334155` (slate-border) |

### 3.5 Motion Token Bindings

| Animation | Duration Token | Easing Token | Reduced Motion |
|---|---|---|---|
| ToggleChip state change | `motion.durations.fast` — 150ms | `motion.easings.default` | Instant |
| Chart bar → line morph | 250ms (between fast/normal) | `motion.easings.emphasized` | Instant swap |
| Chart bar entrance (staggered, capped 600ms total) | `motion.durations.slow` — 600ms | `motion.easings.emphasized` | Instant |
| Line/area fill entrance | `motion.durations.slow` — 600ms | `motion.easings.emphasized` | Instant |
| StatValue counter animation | `motion.durations.normal` — 300ms | `motion.easings.default` | Instant |
| Stacked bar fill L→R | `motion.durations.slow` — 600ms | `motion.easings.emphasized` | Instant |
| Category row hover bg | `motion.durations.fast` — 150ms | `motion.easings.default` | Instant |
| ChartTooltip fade-in | `motion.durations.fast` — 150ms | `motion.easings.default` | Instant |
| SegmentTooltip fade-in | `motion.durations.fast` — 150ms | `motion.easings.default` | Instant |
| Stacked segment lift | `motion.durations.fast` — 150ms | `motion.easings.default` | Instant |
| Comparison bars entrance | `motion.durations.slow` — 600ms | `motion.easings.emphasized` | Instant |
| BiggestExpenses list fade swap | out 150ms / in 200ms | `motion.easings.default` | Instant |
| ExportButton label swap | Immediate | — | — |
| ExportButton revert delay | 1500ms hold | — | — |
| Month selector: data debounce | 300ms | — | — |

### 3.6 Dimension & Geometry Token Bindings

| Element | Property | Value | Token / Rule |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ChartPlotArea` | height | 200px | Spec default |
| `AverageLine` | stroke-width | 2px | Research brief §11 recommendation |
| `AverageLine` | stroke-dasharray | `6 4` | Dashed style |
| `DataPointCircle` | radius | 6px | Research brief §7.2 |
| `CategoryStackedBar` | height | 12px | Spec §7.3 |
| `CategoryStackedBar` | border-radius | 6px | `borders.radius.small` |
| `StackedSegment` | min-width | 4px | Research brief §2.4 |
| `ProgressBar` container | width | 120px | Spec §7.3 |
| `ProgressBar` container | height | 6px | Spec §7.3 |
| `ProgressBar` container | border-radius | 4px | Spec §7.3 |
| `CategoryRow` | height | 44px | `touch_targets.minimum_height` |
| `RankBadge` | width / height | 28px | Spec §7.4 |
| `RankBadge` | border-radius | 9999px | `borders.radius.pill` |
| `ExpenseRow` | height | 52px | Spec §7.4 |
| `ComparisonBar` | width | 56px | Spec §7.5 |
| `ComparisonBar` | max-height | 120px | Spec §7.5 |
| `ComparisonBar` | min-height | 4px (if value > 0) | Zero-bar guard |
| `ComparisonBar` | border-radius | `6px 6px 0 0` | `borders.radius.small` top only |
| `ExportCsvButton` | min-height | 44px | `touch_targets.minimum_height` |
| `ExportCsvButton` | border-radius | 6px | `borders.radius.small` |
| `ExportCsvButton` | border-width | 1px | — |
| `ToggleChip` | min-height | 44px | `touch_targets.minimum_height` |
| `ToggleChip` | border-radius | 6px | `borders.radius.small` |
| `ToggleChip` | padding | 0 12px | — |
| `TopBar` | height | 64px | Layout rule |
| `TopBar` | z-index | 1100 | `z_index.sticky` |
| `ChartTooltip` | z-index | 1400 | `z_index.tooltip` |
| `SegmentTooltip` | z-index | 1400 | `z_index.tooltip` |
| `ComparisonBarGroup` | height | 160px | 120px bar + 40px labels |

---
